textByHash.f6df20bb5c3b1a43383d7a7f7833e0ae7d3616f2: What are you doing in here?
textByHash.e8a8f71f446a2d54ba31b0d9ea4a4391d3819556: You don't belong in here, get out!
textByHash.7a29ec066225d821696fd5ba0889e2bd6e22dd93: Well, okay, but very quickly. I am a very busy person you know!
textByHash.bcce7df2f1b2ca75030ce19ae4812bf4becfa2c1: Come on, spit it out! Right that's it! Guards!
textByHash.414ed69f646e93357458f871a0ebdf61d0f98bd0: Really! Where? I don't see any dragons young man? Now, please get out of my office, I have work to do.
textByHash.b812b3718dc5efff489c3c0ca0d55288a268965c: Really! Where? I don't see any dragons young lady? Now, please get out of my office, I have work to do.
textByHash.4d261d5707597941f5bd540101d1f23b83ca2bda: Yes, I do. Now please get to the point?
textByHash.1e1fb8fa10d57205ed40f6e19b992a42104f125a: Long enough to know when someone is stalling!
textByHash.d57197557c59259d2f30f19cb7b557ac370bb5a7: Please state your business or get out!
textByHash.b2bfdbfc8f75754d8ec27bc73818d8deca7ec7af: Well, yes actually... It's been a passion of mine for some years...
textByHash.6943f49035eabcb43a9ef109eb60f9294f3eda0b: Well, I was quite a catch in my day you know!
textByHash.9583d33c37a20e499dcd5c1a610ab8b36b119bae: Well of course there isn't, we're surrounded by desert. Now, why are you here exactly?
textByHash.a5436850a546748c991c36227a07ac47701a14fa: This happens to be my office. Now explain yourself before I run you through!
textByHash.b2e74a78ff9f6c4ba87444764d61087d7b4814b6: Well, I most certainly am not lonely!
textByHash.6b600bb07fdc4266dc2507f5cbf33141b289cc73: I'm an incredibly busy man you know! Now, get to the point, what do you want?
textByHash.beca2fb5bfee48b2aba38f31ff931facd061a937: There's nothing wrong with the chest, it's fine, now get out!
textByHash.e639eefe46ba78bd8d56494f0fa02119dbb24a12: Don't talk rubbish, the warning siren isn't sounding. Now state your business before I have you thrown out.
textByHash.f68b4d0f781c602240258da5b5564cd16f3fcffc: Where's the fire? I don't see any fire? Stop messing me around and state your business!
textByHash.beba751fae4bfd14d2bd5c70356f0268e91f840a: You go and sound the alarm, I can't see anything wrong with the mine. Have you seen the fire yourself?
textByHash.fe6dbc70a57d09b1997f2a7dfd86fdfcf17cb910: Well, why didn't you raise the alarm?
textByHash.c5edc69802d9e0df98f0871699fb14470e13fa13: That's the most ridiculous thing I've heard. Who are you? Where do you come from? It doesn't matter... Guards! Show this person out!
textByHash.85831a13f068e3d4c4fd6fe45ac579b46ea5a616: Well, that's very good of you. But as you can see, I am very fine and well thanks! Now, please leave so that I can get back to my work.
textByHash.d62aac568197c0dba658c5231bfa13f81632f9fd: Well... you can't believe them, they're all a bunch of convicts. Anyway, it doesn't look as if there is a fire down there. So I'm going to get on with my work. Please remove yourself from my office.
textByHash.9157cef8e3a275d5cca73865659f67a97d5bea33: Good, now perhaps you can leave me in peace? After all I do have some work to do.
textByHash.fe6502b9d3ac2a60065d39d5446d2318e0e5f7bd: Good! Please remove yourself from my office.
textByHash.d526e76f7f36f9fbe614ed5dd700bf5bc2f514a1: The whole place is falling apart, to be honest. I'd jump at the chance to shut it all down for good.
textByHash.cca1a3a627a262833b8296eea6abebfaac1394ee: Your crew? As in, go back to sailing?
textByHash.ce76354ac29e9ce15f3cbb27a1715ab597e6260c: It's tempting, but you don't look like you'd last a day on the high seas.
textByHash.f73c379d52f2e36211f2e47f4868ccbb93488721: I can't see how I could refuse an offer like that! Let's get to it!
